title: Bobua arisanensis

Bobua arisanensis is an endangered species and is also known as a medicinal plant. The plant is classified as a member of the genus Bobua, which is a relatively newly discovered group of plants. Further research is needed to fully understand the classification and characteristics of Bobua arisanensis.
